positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic celestial map displayed on a stylized, antique scroll. The central motif is a grouping of abstract constellations formed by glowing neon-blue and magenta lines, connecting stylized, minimalist celestial bodies like crescent moons, geometric stars, and ringed planets. The background should be a deep indigo gradient, textured like midnight velvet, subtly overlaid with faint cosmic dust and stylized constellations. Emphasize strong silhouettes and clean lines. Composition should be centered and balanced for a repeat print, with distinct visual elements arranged in a pleasing pattern. Style: Mid-century modern illustration meets vaporwave aesthetics, high contrast, perfect for apparel printing. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal glow emanating only from the celestial elements. Color palette: Deep indigo, electric blue, magenta, and subtle gold accents.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, artifact, low resolution, noise, text, letters, messy, grainy, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, duplicate
